subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Make these pure and sanctified souls the children of the Kingdom, and these luminous faces [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار این نفوس طیبه طاهره را ابناء ملکوت فرما و این وجوه نورانی را
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual transformation, @power of prayer, @universal peace; world unity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
